title: Join our Alpha: Help shape monday AI agents
excerpt:

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re looking for community members to join an early alpha for our new AI agents.

In simple terms, it’s an agent builder designed to work within the context of your boards, data, workflows, and permissions and help you work faster.

This alpha is for non-technical roles (Marketing, Sales, Ops, etc.), across different industries.
You’ll be asked to build at least one agent and share your feedback in a few short sessions with the product team.

If you like being involved early and influencing how things are built, we’d love your input.
(Your account needs to be approved for AI usage.)

Sign-up link here.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: @YuvalAp That form doesn’t work with Google sign-in.

posts.author: JonahScott (Jonah Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: Sounds like an exciting chance to influence monday.com’s AI agents early on — especially if you enjoy shaping tools that help you work smarter! Would love to hear how the agents perform in real workflows and what features you think matter most.

posts.author: cdalbey (Chelsea Dalbey)
posts.cookedHtml:
The form was not working for me- but I’m very interested in this!

My Monday account is cdalbey@accessinfusioncare.com

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks to everyone who signed up!
We currently have enough participants for this alpha, so we’re closing registration for now.

We’ll share updates as soon as more opportunities like this open up.
